title: Umami Tender Raw-Friendly Irish Quinoa Stir-fry
description: This raw-friendly and post-workout dish features tender quinoa infused with umami flavors in a tadka-style stir-fry.

ingredients.name: Shallots
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for maximum surface area and flavor infusion

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced, sautéed to develop a rich taste

ingredients.name: Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Finely chopped for garnish and added freshness

ingredients.name: Tadka spices
ingredients.notes: A mix of mustard seeds, cumin seeds, curry leaves, chili peppers (optional), and other raw-friendly herbs/vegetables like ginger and garlic in a bit of oil for the initial tadka

ingredients.name: Raw onion
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly for faster cooking and better texture

ingredients.name: Raw bell pepper
ingredients.notes: To add color and a bit of crunch

instructions: Heat a tadka of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the shallots and garlic cloves, sauté for about 2-3 minutes until translucent.
Gradually add cooked quinoa to the pan with the tadka spices, tossing to coat evenly.
Include finely chopped raw onion and bell pepper for additional flavors and textures.
Season lightly with salt and fresh lime juice if desired. Avoid adding too much salt or acidity as it can inhibit the raw-friendly properties of the dish.
